source_units.text_raw:
The DMS zone is located in the Downtown Periphery area surrounding much of the downtown core. The area supports many of the downtown's groundfloor commercial areas and pedestrian oriented streetscapes. The area supports a mix of commercial, office, small scale accommodations, and upper floor residential uses.
Rezoning to the DC, DMU, or DN zone may be considered in the DMS Zone if the requirements of the Official Plan can be demonstrated to be met.
The following uses are permitted in the DMS Zone:
Converted Dwelling
Commercial Daycare Centre
Community Care Facility
Community Institutional
Cultural Establishment
Educational Institution (private)
Educational Institution (public)
Fire Station
Funeral Establishment
Government Offices
Library
Medical, Health and Dental Office
Multi-unit dwelling
Police Station
Recreation or Fitness Center (indoors)
Convenience Store
Eating and Drinking Establishment
Entertainment Establishment
Grocery Store
Hostel / Hotel
Encroachments into the public street right- of-way for decks, signage, public art, and architectural features above 3 m from grade at the streetline may be considered by Planning Board.
Permitted encroachments into the setbacks are listed in Table 3.1.
Short term rentals are permitted following the requirements of Section 4.10.
Sidewalk cafes and patios may be permitted following the requirements of Section 4.2.
Gas stations may be permitted by Development Agreement.
Developments lower than 6 m in height may be permitted by Development Agreement.
One primary building per lot is permitted in the DMS Zone.
The minimum building height shall be 2 storeys.
The maximum building height shall be:
The height shown in schedule B for unregistered heritage properties.
For registered heritage properties, the height shall be the height of the existing heritage building unless negotiated through a Heritage Development Agreement.
The maximum streetwall height shall be 3 storeys.
The minimum streetwall stepback shall be 2.5 m.
The streetwall stepback may be less than the minimum requirement for up to 30% of the width of the building facing the streetline.
Office
Personal Service Shop
Retail Store
Service Repair Establishment
Shopping Centre
Theatre
Veterinary Services
These uses are permitted so long as the following lot requirements are met:
Lot Area N/A
Frontage min. 7 .6 m
Front Yard Setback min. 0 m max. 3 m the front yard setback may be greater than the max. for up to 20% of the streetline
Flankage Yard Setback min. 0 m max. 3 m the flankage yard setback may be greater than the max. for up to 50% of the streetline
Side Yard Setback min. 0 m
Rear Yard Setback min. 3 m when abutting DC or DMS, otherwise 6 m
Coverage max. 100%
The maximum building dimension is 60 m.
The minimum groundfloor height shall not be less than 3.5 m in height and shall be no more than 1.5 m above or below the average streetline grade. Registered heritage properties shall maintain their groundfloor height.
Groundfloor uses in the DMS zone are reserved for active uses like retail, offices, institutional uses, and lobbies, and are restricted from uses such as:
No less than 50% groundfloor uses that are commercial, office or institutional.
Parking (unless placed no less than 12m behind an active groundfloor use), and
Grade-related residential dwellings (except residential lobbies) unless placed no less than 10 m behind an active groundfloor use.
A streetwall frontage shall extend no less than 80% of the width of any streetline unless an at-grade plaza is or a mid-block pedestrian connection is provided or if an existing heritage facade is preserved which is less than the full width.
Cantilevered or recessed portions within any streetwall that have a depth of 2 m or greater shall not exceed 30% of the width of the streetwall.
Parking garage entries are permitted if they are less than 40% of the frontage.
Parking garage doors shall be set back no less than 3 m from the front lot line.
The maximum front or flanking setback Front Yard Setback 0-3 m Min. Lot Frontage 7.6 m Figure 14.1 DMS Zone Built Form Standards Max. Building Dimensions 70 m Midrise Side Yard Setback 0 m Max. Building Height See Schedule B Min. Streetwall Stepback 2.5 m at 3rd Storey for 70% Max. Lot Coverage 100% Groundfloor Use Commercial, office, institutional, lobby
See Section 6.8-6.9

review_flags.description: PDF text order and figure/table text were extracted with pypdf; verify section order, column flow, and page layout before normalization.
The zone contains table, figure, or schedule text. Values are preserved as extracted text and require source PDF layout review before normalization.
Some extracted text was not safely assigned to a labeled section and is preserved in content_blocks.
